tasks.subject: Task 1: Scaffold flow-compose lib + copy unchanged engine/ui parts
tasks.description:
Generate tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose (vitest, scope:tommy tags), add the tsconfig.base path, create flow-types.ts (trimmed v1 flow-def), copy verbatim external-redirect + ui/*, copy flow-backend + schema-helpers redirecting ./flow-def→./flow-types, copy mitid (return path /flow-compose), flow-state-store (KEY flow-compose:snapshot), and wizard with `phase` removed (+ adjusted wizard.spec).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/", "tsconfig.base.json", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-types.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/wizard.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lint passes", "copied specs pass", "wizard has no phase", "no import from flow-forge"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Define the contract surface: FlowStep directive + FlowConfig
tasks.description:
Create flow-config.ts (FlowConfig<Model>), flow-step.ts (FlowStep + FlowStepContext + guard, aliases flowStep/Key/Label), flow-slots.ts (FlowIntro exposing template + FlowReceipt with {$implicit: SubmitOk}; no FlowError). flow-types.ts already exists from Task 1. Specs: flow-step.spec, flow-slots.spec.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-config.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-step.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-slots.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-step.spec.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-slots.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose --testPathPattern=\"flow-step|flow-slots\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FlowStep aliases + guard", "FlowIntro/FlowReceipt directives with template + receipt context", "specs pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Rewrite FlowRunner as a content-querying shell
tasks.description:
Write flow-runner.ts + .html (phase machine intro|form|done|error, standardized footers, lazy wizard from contentChildren(FlowStep), intro/receipt slots via contentChild.required, built-in error page, submit state machine, resume effect), testing/test-host.ts, and flow-runner.spec.ts (phases/gate/200/422/202/error/resume).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/testing/test-host.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-runner.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose --testPathPattern=flow-runner", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four phases render correct body+footer", "gate + 200/422/202 preserved (422 inline)", "load+submit error pages + retry behavior", "resume re-submits to done"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Build the FlowResume single-read service
tasks.description:
Create resume.ts (PendingResume DTO) and flow-resume.ts (FlowResume: consume = sole parseCallback+store.restore reader validating state nonce + schemaVersion; pending = multi-read approved-only; cancelledNotice). Spec covers approved/cancelled/replay/no-callback/unknown-slug.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/resume.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-resume.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/engine/flow-resume.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose --testPathPattern=flow-resume", "acceptanceCriteria": ["consume sole reader, validates state+version", "pending multi-read approved-only", "cancelledNotice on cancelled", "replay/no-callback/unknown-slug yield null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Port the three flows as components (newsletter, bank, insurance)
tasks.description:
Per flow: write <name>-flow.ts + .html (runner top-level, steps under @if(form()), flowIntro/flowReceipt slots, [loadError] + (retry)=env.reload()), <name>-config.ts, form.ts builder; copy model.ts (split emptyModel→env-free skeleton with tos:[]), schema/fixtures (redirect ./flow-def→./flow-types), steps/* (drop implements StepComponent); copy shared tos-step.ts (data→terms). Port bank round-trip spec (drive <bank-flow>, FlowResume.consume for phase B; assert BANK-bank-0001).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/steps/tos-step.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flows/bank/round-trip.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose --testPathPattern=\"flows/\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["flows render intro/steps/receipt + tos seeding + load-error page", "TosStep terms input, steps drop StepComponent", "bank round-trip → BANK-bank-0001", "schema/fixtures specs pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Build the @switch launcher + FLOW_CARDS + boot consume
tasks.description:
Write flow-fixtures.ts (FLOW_FIXTURES_MAP), flow-cards.ts (FLOW_CARDS + FLOW_VERSIONS), flow-compose.ts (consume on boot, selected signal, co-provide FLOW_FIXTURES+FlowBackend), flow-compose.html (@switch over slug + gallery), flow-compose.spec.ts (gallery lists, click renders, cancelled callback).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flow-compose.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flow-compose.html", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flow-cards.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flow-fixtures.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/lib/flow-compose.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose --testPathPattern=flow-compose", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gallery + @switch render flows", "backend+fixtures co-provided", "auto-resume + cancelled notice on boot", "no registry cast"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Tests, AOT gate, README ledger, public API
tasks.description:
Write index.ts (export FlowCompose, FlowRunner, FlowStep, FlowIntro, FlowReceipt, FlowConfig + public types; no FlowError). Register flow-compose in apps/tommy/host registry (lazy m.FlowCompose) and update experiment.spec slug order. Run `pnpm nx build tommy-host` (AOT strictTemplates gate). Write README ledger. Full lib + host green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/src/index.ts", "libs/tommy/signal-forms/flow-compose/README.md", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments/registry.ts", "apps/tommy/host/src/app/experiments/experiment.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-signal-forms-flow-compose && pnpm nx build tommy-host && pnpm nx test tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["index exports public surface (no FlowError)", "host registered + experiment.spec updated", "nx build tommy-host AOT passes", "all lib + host tests green", "README ledger documented"]}
```
